Web app + native desktop (Windows / macOS)

Adelphos Chat

Your project's brain — without Revit, without a desk.

Same agent. Same project context. Browser, phone, or desktop. The Adelphos Chat is the agent untethered from any one tool.

Open Adelphos Chat → Download desktop app
Anywherebrowser · desktop · mobile
1shared project memory across devices
Read-writeto your DMS and project folders

AI chat assistant for MEP engineering projects

Adelphos Chat runs in any modern browser and as a native Windows / macOS desktop app. It carries the same project memory the Revit Copilot uses — when you log in, it already knows which project you're working on, what you discussed yesterday, what's in the brief, what's in the spec, and what was last issued.

From the chat you can query the live Revit model (read-only when off-Revit, read-write when connected), pull figures from your calc spreadsheets, draft client-ready text, search project minutes, and trigger any tool the platform exposes.

For a project lead this typically reclaims 3 to 5 hours per week previously lost to context switching: walking back to the desk to look something up, opening Revit just to read a schedule, drafting the same status update three times across email, Teams and meetings. It also removes the daily "can someone send me…" pings to the modelling team because the agent can answer them instantly with the live data.

Adelphos Chat will be the only project-aware AI surface for engineers — same agent, same project memory, same standards, anywhere you can open a browser.

From desk-bound Revit access to project-aware AI anywhere

What working looks like today versus with Adelphos Chat.

Before

On site, in a meeting, on a train. Need a number from the model, a quote from the brief, a check against the spec — and you can't open Revit.

After Adelphos Chat

Ask Adelphos. It already knows the project. It pulls the answer from the live model, the brief, the spec, the schedule. You move on.

Project-memory chat with read-write access to live model data

Most AI chat tools are stateless and project-blind. Adelphos Chat is built around your projects: it remembers what you discussed yesterday, knows which job you're on, and can act on the live data, not a snapshot.

Features

What Adelphos Chat does. Each line is a shipped capability.

AEC specialist on tap Trained on MEP, BIM, Building Safety, RIBA stages, ACC and CIBSE/BSRIA guides — answers like a senior engineer, not a generalist chatbot.
Drafts MEP specifications Authors Stage 2/3/4 specs from the live Revit model, brief and your house manufacturer library.
Builds and validates schedules Generates radiator, AHU, fan, light and fixture schedules straight from the model — and gap-checks them against your calcs.
Drafts client documents Status updates, scope notes, meeting minutes, site reports, survey writeups — formatted to your house style.
Live model query (Bridge on) Pull a number, parameter, view or schedule row from the live Revit model in seconds.
Reads project folders Briefs, specs, schedules, calc spreadsheets, prior drawings — all ingested and searchable.
Files incoming files Drag in PDFs, surveys, photos, emails — auto-filed against the right project, with the right metadata.
Project memory Remembers what you discussed yesterday, which job you're on, and every decision logged so far.
Search the project decision log Every previous answer, decision and rationale is searchable — the project's institutional memory.

Install & system

Where Adelphos Chat runs, what you need, and how to get it.

Web Any modern browser — Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Safari. No install.
Windows Windows 10 / 11, 64-bit · 4 GB RAM · 200 MB disk · auto-updates
macOS macOS 12 Monterey or later · Apple Silicon native

Requirements

  • Internet connection for chat (offline drafting is limited).
  • An Adelphos account (free tier available).
  • Optional: MEP Bridge installed locally for live Revit read/write.

Sign-in

Sign in with Microsoft, Google or an email magic link.

Open in browser or download installer → Read the docs first

For project leads on site, in meetings, or off-Revit

Project leads on siteOff-Revit consultationsDrafting reports + briefs

Related

App Revit Copilot Talk to Revit. The Copilot understands your model, applies your standards, and runs the 163 commands and 191 tools that ship with the platform. App Specbuilder Specbuilder reads the model, applies your office standards, layers your preferred manufacturers, and produces a stage-appropriate specification — ready for issue. Agentic service AI Finances Automated bookkeeping, invoicing and cash-flow forecasting — driven by your live project data.

Frequently asked questions

Quick answers AI engines (and humans) can pull from.

What is Adelphos Chat?

Same agent. Same project context. Browser, phone, or desktop. The Adelphos Chat is the agent untethered from any one tool.

What does Adelphos Chat do?

Adelphos Chat runs in any modern browser and as a native Windows / macOS desktop app. It carries the same project memory the Revit Copilot uses — when you log in, it already knows which project you're working on, what you discussed yesterday, what's in the brief, what's in the spec, and what was last issued.

How is Adelphos Chat different from the manual workflow?

Without Adelphos Chat: On site, in a meeting, on a train. Need a number from the model, a quote from the brief, a check against the spec — and you can't open Revit. With Adelphos Chat: Ask Adelphos. It already knows the project. It pulls the answer from the live model, the brief, the spec, the schedule. You move on.

How much time does Adelphos Chat save?

Headline outcomes for Adelphos Chat: Anywhere (browser · desktop · mobile); 1 (shared project memory across devices); Read-write (to your DMS and project folders).

What platform does Adelphos Chat run on?

Web app + native desktop (Windows / macOS)

Who is Adelphos Chat for?

Project leads on site; Off-Revit consultations; Drafting reports + briefs.

How do I get Adelphos Chat?

Self-serve: Open Adelphos Chat at https://chat.adelphos.ai. No sales call required.

Ready to put Adelphos Chat to work?

Open Adelphos Chat in your browser — no install needed.

Open Adelphos Chat →
